description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a tan polymer body and black metallic components, featuring a modular design. The rifle is equipped with a collapsible stock, a detachable box magazine, and a vertical foregrip for enhanced control. A large suppressor is attached to the end of the barrel, reducing muzzle flash and noise. The top rail supports a mounted red dot or holographic sight for rapid target acquisition. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet robust construction, suitable for urban operations. The combination of polymer and metal materials gives it a rugged, professional appearance.
description: A tan and black tactical rifle with a suppressor, collapsible stock, vertical foregrip, and a mounted red dot or holographic sight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan body, black suppressor, collapsible stock, vertical foregrip, and mounted sight.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the suppressor's diameter and alignment, with the sight and foregrip visible above and below the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and sight alignment, with the suppressor extending forward.
